responsibilities: Maintain centralized project schedules, tracking milestones, dependencies, and deliverables across multiple concurrent workstreams
Prepare consolidated status reports and dashboards summarizing project health, risks, and budget variance for leadership review
Track project risks and issues through a structured log, following up with workstream owners to ensure timely resolution
Monitor project budgets against actuals, flagging cost overruns and supporting finance teams with variance explanations
Coordinate governance forums including steering committees and working groups to support timely decision-making
Standardize project documentation templates and reporting cadences to improve consistency across the project portfolio
Support resource capacity planning by tracking team allocations and identifying potential staffing conflicts across projects
Manage change control processes, documenting scope changes and their impact on timeline, budget, and resources
